title: Ectropy Strategic Technical Analysis: Prisma, Graph Migration, MCP Implementation & Repository Synchronization

metadata.title: Ectropy Strategic Technical Analysis: Prisma, Graph Migration, MCP Implementation & Repository Synchronization

content.raw:
# Ectropy Strategic Technical Analysis: Prisma, Graph Migration, MCP Implementation & Repository Synchronization

**Document Version:** 1.0.0  
**Date:** January 16, 2026  
**Author:** Enterprise Architecture Session  
**Status:** Strategic Planning Document

---

## Executive Summary

This document analyzes the next phases of Ectropy development across four critical dimensions:

1. **Prisma Model Extensions** - Adding Contract-to-Operations models to existing M3 schema
2. **Graph Database Migration** - Value proposition and lift assessment for PostgreSQL → Graph transition
3. **MCP Tool Implementation** - Current state and roadmap for 39 total tools
4. **Repository Synchronization** - Preparing luhtech/Ectropy for the January 17 split

---

## Part 1: Prisma Model Extension Analysis

### 1.1 Current State (M3 Complete - 12 Models)

The existing `prisma/schema.prisma` contains 12 production-ready models from the Decision Lifecycle milestone:

| Model                     | Purpose                       | URN Pattern                                        | Status    |
| ------------------------- | ----------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------- | --------- |
| `AuthorityLevel`          | 7-tier cascade definition     | `urn:luhtech:ectropy:authority-level:pm-level-{N}` | ✅ Active |
| `Participant`             | Project stakeholder           | `urn:luhtech:{project}:participant:{id}`           | ✅ Active |
| `Voxel`                   | 3D spatial decision container | `urn:luhtech:{project}:voxel:{id}`                 | ✅ Active |
| `PMDecision`              | Construction decision         | `urn:luhtech:{project}:pm-decision:{id}`           | ✅ Active |
| `VoxelDecisionAttachment` | Decision-to-voxel link        | N/A (join table)                                   | ✅ Active |
| `ToleranceOverride`       | Pre-approved variance         | `urn:luhtech:{project}:tolerance:{id}`             | ✅ Active |
| `PreApproval`             | Standing approval scope       | N/A (embedded)                                     | ✅ Active |
| `VoxelAlert`              | Spatial alert                 | N/A (embedded)                                     | ✅ Active |
| `Acknowledgment`          | Worker acknowledgment         | N/A (join table)                                   | ✅ Active |
| `Consequence`             | Decision outcome tracking     | `urn:luhtech:{project}:consequence:{id}`           | ✅ Active |
| `ScheduleProposal`        | Look-ahead modification       | `urn:luhtech:{project}:schedule-proposal:{id}`     | ✅ Active |
| `Inspection`              | Field inspection record       | `urn:luhtech:{project}:inspection:{id}`            | ✅ Active |

### 1.2 Required New Models (Contract-to-Operations)

Based on the completed schema documentation, **15 additional Prisma models** are required:

#### Contract Domain (3 models)

```prisma
// Contract.prisma - Governing contract for project
model Contract {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  urn               String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  project_id        String   @map("project_id") @db.Uuid
  contract_id       String   @map("contract_id") @db.VarChar(20) // CNTR-2026-0001
  contract_type     ContractType @map("contract_type")
  title             String   @db.VarChar(255)
  execution_date    DateTime @map("execution_date") @db.Date
  // ... authority cascade extracted from contract
  authority_cascade Json     @map("authority_cascade") @db.JsonB
  // IPD-specific
  is_ipd            Boolean  @default(false) @map("is_ipd")
  target_cost_ref   String?  @map("target_cost_ref") @db.VarChar(200)
  profit_at_risk    Json?    @map("profit_at_risk") @db.JsonB
  savings_distribution Json? @map("savings_distribution") @db.JsonB
  graph_metadata    Json?    @map("graph_metadata") @db.JsonB
  // Relations
  project           Project  @relation(fields: [project_id], references: [id])
  parties           ContractParty[]
  // ... timestamps
}

model ContractParty {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  contract_id       String   @map("contract_id") @db.Uuid
  party_role        PartyRole @map("party_role")
  company_name      String   @map("company_name") @db.VarChar(255)
  share_percentage  Decimal? @map("share_percentage") @db.Decimal(5,2)
  at_risk_percentage Decimal? @map("at_risk_percentage") @db.Decimal(5,2)
  // Relations
  contract          Contract @relation(fields: [contract_id], references: [id])
}

model ContractTemplate {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  urn               String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  template_type     TemplateType @map("template_type")
  document_standard String   @map("document_standard") @db.VarChar(50) // AIA, ConsensusDocs
  authority_rules   Json     @map("authority_rules") @db.JsonB
  // ... clauses, sections
}
```

#### IPD Governance Domain (3 models)

```prisma
model VotingSession {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  urn               String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  project_id        String   @map("project_id") @db.Uuid
  voting_body       VotingBody @map("voting_body") // PMT or PET
  topic             String   @db.Text
  motion_text       String   @map("motion_text") @db.Text
  rule_type         VotingRule @map("rule_type") // UNANIMOUS, SUPERMAJORITY, MAJORITY
  status            VotingStatus @default(OPEN)
  votes             Json     @db.JsonB // Array of vote objects
  deadline          DateTime @db.Timestamptz(6)
  // Relations
  project           Project  @relation(fields: [project_id], references: [id])
}

model TargetCost {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  urn               String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  project_id        String   @map("project_id") @db.Uuid
  version           Int      @default(1)
  status            TargetCostStatus @default(PROPOSED)
  base_amount       Decimal  @map("base_amount") @db.Decimal(15,2)
  contingency_amount Decimal @map("contingency_amount") @db.Decimal(15,2)
  total_target_cost Decimal  @map("total_target_cost") @db.Decimal(15,2)
  adjustments       Json?    @db.JsonB
  // Relations
  project           Project  @relation(fields: [project_id], references: [id])
}

model SavingsDistribution {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  urn               String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  closeout_id       String   @map("closeout_id") @db.Uuid
  distribution_type DistributionType @map("distribution_type") // SAVINGS or OVERRUN
  total_amount      Decimal  @map("total_amount") @db.Decimal(15,2)
  distributions     Json     @db.JsonB // Array of party distributions
  status            DistributionStatus @default(PENDING_APPROVAL)
  // Relations
  closeout          Closeout @relation(fields: [closeout_id], references: [id])
}
```

#### Closeout Domain (3 models)

```prisma
model Closeout {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  urn               String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  project_id        String   @map("project_id") @db.Uuid
  status            CloseoutStatus @default(PRE_SUBSTANTIAL)
  phases            Json     @db.JsonB // Phase status tracking
  substantial_completion_date DateTime? @map("substantial_completion_date") @db.Date
  final_completion_date DateTime? @map("final_completion_date") @db.Date
  documentation_status Json   @map("documentation_status") @db.JsonB
  // Relations
  project           Project  @relation(fields: [project_id], references: [id])
  g704_certificate  G704Certificate?
  punch_items       PunchItem[]
  savings_distribution SavingsDistribution?
}

model G704Certificate {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  urn               String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  closeout_id       String   @unique @map("closeout_id") @db.Uuid
  certificate_number String  @map("certificate_number") @db.VarChar(50)
  substantial_completion_date DateTime @map("substantial_completion_date") @db.Date
  punch_list_deadline DateTime @map("punch_list_deadline") @db.Date
  signatures        Json     @db.JsonB // Signatory status
  pdf_url           String?  @map("pdf_url") @db.VarChar(500)
  // Relations
  closeout          Closeout @relation(fields: [closeout_id], references: [id])
}

model PunchItem {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  urn               String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  closeout_id       String   @map("closeout_id") @db.Uuid
  voxel_id          String   @map("voxel_id") @db.Uuid
  item_number       Int      @map("item_number")
  title             String   @db.VarChar(200)
  category          PunchCategory
  priority          PunchPriority
  status            PunchStatus @default(OPEN)
  assignee_urn      String?  @map("assignee_urn") @db.VarChar(200)
  sla_deadline      DateTime? @map("sla_deadline") @db.Timestamptz(6)
  completion_photos Json?    @map("completion_photos") @db.JsonB
  // Relations
  closeout          Closeout @relation(fields: [closeout_id], references: [id])
  voxel             Voxel    @relation(fields: [voxel_id], references: [id])
}
```

#### Commissioning Domain (3 models)

```prisma
model CommissioningSystem {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  urn               String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  project_id        String   @map("project_id") @db.Uuid
  system_type       SystemType @map("system_type") // HVAC, PLUMBING, etc.
  system_tag        String   @map("system_tag") @db.VarChar(50)
  status            CxStatus @default(NOT_STARTED)
  prefunctional_complete Boolean @default(false) @map("prefunctional_complete")
  fpt_complete      Boolean  @default(false) @map("fpt_complete")
  // Relations
  project           Project  @relation(fields: [project_id], references: [id])
  functional_tests  FunctionalTest[]
  issues            CxIssue[]
}

model FunctionalTest {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  urn               String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  system_id         String   @map("system_id") @db.Uuid
  test_type         String   @map("test_type") @db.VarChar(100)
  outcome           FPTOutcome
  measurements      Json?    @db.JsonB
  deficiencies      Json?    @db.JsonB
  performed_by      String   @map("performed_by") @db.VarChar(200)
  test_date         DateTime @map("test_date") @db.Timestamptz(6)
  // Relations
  system            CommissioningSystem @relation(fields: [system_id], references: [id])
}

model CxIssue {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  urn               String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  system_id         String   @map("system_id") @db.Uuid
  description       String   @db.Text
  severity          CxIssueSeverity
  status            CxIssueStatus @default(OPEN)
  root_cause_decisions Json? @map("root_cause_decisions") @db.JsonB // URN array
  resolution_decision_urn String? @map("resolution_decision_urn") @db.VarChar(200)
  // Relations
  system            CommissioningSystem @relation(fields: [system_id], references: [id])
}
```

#### Warranty/Operations Domain (3 models)

```prisma
model Warranty {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  urn               String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  project_id        String   @map("project_id") @db.Uuid
  warranty_type     WarrantyType @map("warranty_type")
  item_description  String   @map("item_description") @db.VarChar(500)
  vendor_name       String   @map("vendor_name") @db.VarChar(255)
  start_date        DateTime @map("start_date") @db.Date
  end_date          DateTime @map("end_date") @db.Date
  coverage_details  Json?    @map("coverage_details") @db.JsonB
  // Relations
  project           Project  @relation(fields: [project_id], references: [id])
  claims            WarrantyClaim[]
}

model WarrantyClaim {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  urn               String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  warranty_id       String   @map("warranty_id") @db.Uuid
  claim_type        ClaimType @map("claim_type")
  description       String   @db.Text
  status            ClaimStatus @default(SUBMITTED)
  related_decisions Json?    @map("related_decisions") @db.JsonB // URN array for traceability
  evidence          Json?    @db.JsonB
  // Relations
  warranty          Warranty @relation(fields: [warranty_id], references: [id])
}

model BuildingHistory {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  urn               String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  project_id        String   @map("project_id") @db.Uuid
  query_text        String   @map("query_text") @db.Text
  answer_text       String   @map("answer_text") @db.Text
  sources           Json     @db.JsonB // Decision/document URNs
  queried_by        String   @map("queried_by") @db.VarChar(200)
  queried_at        DateTime @map("queried_at") @db.Timestamptz(6)
  // For caching common queries
  query_hash        String?  @map("query_hash") @db.VarChar(64)
  // Relations
  project           Project  @relation(fields: [project_id], references: [id])
}
```

### 1.3 Migration Effort Estimate

| Task                             | Hours        | Complexity |
| -------------------------------- | ------------ | ---------- |
| Define enums (15 new)            | 4            | Low        |
| Create 15 models                 | 16           | Medium     |
| Add relations to existing models | 8            | Medium     |
| Generate migrations              | 4            | Low        |
| Write seed data scripts          | 12           | Medium     |
| Update TypeScript types          | 8            | Low        |
| Integration testing              | 16           | Medium     |
| **Total**                        | **68 hours** |            |

---

## Part 2: Graph Database Migration Analysis

### 2.1 Current State: JSON-First with Graph Metadata

The V3 architecture uses **PostgreSQL with JSONB graph_metadata columns**:

```json
{
  "$id": "urn:luhtech:project-alpha:pm-decision:DEC-2026-0001",
  "graphMetadata": {
    "inEdges": [
      "urn:luhtech:project-alpha:voxel:VOX-L2-MECH-047",
      "urn:luhtech:project-alpha:participant:john-doe-pm"
    ],
    "outEdges": ["urn:luhtech:project-alpha:consequence:CONSQ-2026-0001"]
  }
}
```

**Advantages:**

- Single database to manage
- Familiar SQL queries for most operations
- Prisma ORM fully supported
- Graph metadata preserved for future migration

**Limitations:**

- Graph traversal requires application-level code
- No native Cypher/Gremlin query support
- Complex joins for deep relationship queries
- Performance degrades with >10,000 edges per query

### 2.2 Migration Target: Neo4j or Dgraph

#### Option A: Neo4j (Recommended)

- **Query Language:** Cypher (intuitive, pattern-matching)
- **Best For:** Complex relationship queries, path analysis
- **APOC Library:** 300+ procedures for advanced graph operations
- **Cost:** Enterprise license required for clustering

#### Option B: Dgraph

- **Query Language:** GraphQL-native
- **Best For:** High-volume writes, horizontal scaling
- **Advantage:** No separate license cost (Apache 2.0)
- **Limitation:** Smaller ecosystem than Neo4j

### 2.3 Value Proposition of Graph Migration

| Use Case                               | PostgreSQL        | Graph DB             | Improvement        |
| -------------------------------------- | ----------------- | -------------------- | ------------------ |
| "Find root cause of consequence X"     | 5-7 JOINs, ~200ms | Single Cypher, ~20ms | **10x faster**     |
| "Show all decisions affecting Level 2" | Complex subquery  | Pattern match        | **Simpler code**   |
| "Traverse 6 levels of escalation"      | Recursive CTE     | `MATCH path=...`     | **Native support** |
| "Find patterns across 100 projects"    | Impractical       | Graph analytics      | **New capability** |
| "Real-time decision impact preview"    | Not feasible      | Graph projection     | **New capability** |

### 2.4 Migration Lift Assessment

#### Phase 1: Dual-Write Architecture (Low Risk)

- Keep PostgreSQL as primary
- Write graph_metadata to Neo4j in parallel
- No production dependency on graph DB
- **Effort:** 40 hours

#### Phase 2: Graph-First Queries (Medium Risk)

- Route relationship queries to Neo4j
- Keep CRUD operations in PostgreSQL
- Fallback to PostgreSQL if graph unavailable
- **Effort:** 80 hours

#### Phase 3: Full Migration (High Value, Higher Risk)

- Move decision graph entirely to Neo4j
- PostgreSQL for user/project CRUD only
- Requires significant testing
- **Effort:** 160 hours

#### Total Estimated Lift: 280 hours (7 weeks)

### 2.5 Recommendation

**Start Phase 1 in Q3 2026 after Canadian pilot launch.**

The current PostgreSQL + JSONB architecture is sufficient for:

- Pilot scale (single project, <10,000 decisions)
- Demo scenarios
- MVP launch

Graph migration becomes critical when:

- Multi-project portfolio queries required
- Pattern recognition across projects
- Real-time decision impact analysis

---

## Part 3: MCP Tool Implementation Analysis

### 3.1 Current State: 17 Implemented Tools

The M2 milestone delivered 17 functional MCP tools in `mcp-tools/decision/mcp-decision-tools.json`:

| Category               | Tool                         | Status         | Notes                      |
| ---------------------- | ---------------------------- | -------------- | -------------------------- |
| Decision Management    | `create_decision_request`    | ✅ Implemented | Full authority calculation |
|                        | `analyze_decision_authority` | ✅ Implemented | 7-tier cascade logic       |
|                        | `record_decision`            | ✅ Implemented | Immutable hash chain       |
|                        | `create_decision_template`   | ✅ Implemented | Pattern library            |
| Graph Operations       | `traverse_decision_graph`    | ✅ Implemented | Root cause analysis        |
|                        | `attach_decision_to_voxels`  | ✅ Implemented | Auto BIM element lookup    |
|                        | `get_voxel_decision_surface` | ✅ Implemented | Worker entry point         |
| Voxel Operations       | `acknowledge_voxel_decision` | ✅ Implemented | GPS/UWB verification       |
|                        | `find_voxels_for_work`       | ✅ Implemented | Task-based lookup          |
|                        | `create_tolerance_override`  | ✅ Implemented | Pre-approval storage       |
|                        | `calculate_voxel_savings`    | ✅ Implemented | Value metrics              |
| Schedule Integration   | `create_schedule_proposal`   | ✅ Implemented | AI conflict detection      |
|                        | `get_10day_lookahead`        | ✅ Implemented | Look-ahead view            |
| Consequence Tracking   | `record_consequence`         | ✅ Implemented | Auto graph trace           |
| Inspection Integration | `get_inspection_view`        | ✅ Implemented | Spatial decision view      |
|                        | `record_inspection`          | ✅ Implemented | Sign-off workflow          |
| Community              | `calculate_reward`           | ✅ Implemented | Gamification points        |

### 3.3 MCP Implementation Architecture

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                      MCP Server (Port 4002)                     │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│  Tool Registry  │  Tool Executor  │  Response Formatter         │
├─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┤
│                                                                 │
│  ┌─────────────┐  ┌─────────────┐  ┌─────────────┐             │
│  │  Decision   │  │   Voxel     │  │  Schedule   │             │
│  │   Tools     │  │   Tools     │  │   Tools     │             │
│  │   (17)      │  │   (5)       │  │   (2)       │             │
│  └──────┬──────┘  └──────┬──────┘  └──────┬──────┘             │
│         │                │                │                     │
│  ┌──────┴────────────────┴────────────────┴──────┐             │
│  │            Prisma Client (PostgreSQL)          │             │
│  │       + Graph Metadata (JSONB columns)         │             │
│  └────────────────────────────────────────────────┘             │
│                                                                 │

│  │   (3) 📋    │  │   (6) 📋    │  │   (3) 📋    │             │
│  └─────────────┘  └─────────────┘  └─────────────┘             │
│                                                                 │
│  ┌─────────────┐  ┌─────────────┐  ┌─────────────┐             │
│  │Commissioning│  │  Punch List │  │  Warranty   │             │
│  │   Tools     │  │   Tools     │  │   Tools     │             │
│  │   (3) 📋    │  │   (4) 📋    │  │   (3) 📋    │             │
│  └─────────────┘  └─────────────┘  └─────────────┘             │
│                                                                 │

### 3.4 Expected Functionality by Release

| Release               | Tools | Functionality                                              |
| --------------------- | ----- | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| **v1.2.0** (Current)  | 17    | Decision lifecycle, voxel operations, schedule integration |
| **v1.3.0** (May 2026) | +9    | Contract parsing, IPD governance, basic closeout           |
| **v1.4.0** (Sep 2026) | +7    | Full closeout, commissioning, punch list                   |
| **v1.5.0** (Dec 2026) | +6    | Warranty, operations handoff, building history             |

## Part 4: Repository Synchronization Strategy

### 4.1 Current Repository Structure

```
luhtech/Ectropy (Active Development)
├── .roadmap/                    # V3 source of truth
│   ├── roadmap.json
│   ├── architecture.json
│   ├── infrastructure-catalog.json
│   ├── features/                # NEW - Feature documentation
│   │   ├── decision-lifecycle/
│   │   ├── contract-onboarding/
│   │   ├── ipd-governance/
│   │   ├── closeout/
│   │   ├── commissioning/
│   │   ├── punch-list/
│   │   └── warranty-operations/
│   └── schemas/                 # NEW - V3 schemas
│       ├── contract/
│       ├── ipd/
│       ├── closeout/
│       ├── commissioning/
│       └── warranty/
├── prisma/
│   └── schema.prisma           # M3 models + future extensions
├── apps/
│   └── mcp-server/             # MCP implementation
└── mcp-tools/
    └── decision/               # Tool definitions
```

### 4.2 Target Split Structure (January 17, 2026)

```
ectropy-ai/ectropy (Public - Apache 2.0)
├── .roadmap/                    # Mirrored from luhtech
│   ├── roadmap.json            # Quarterly milestones
│   ├── features/               # Feature specifications
│   └── schemas/                # V3 JSON schemas
├── prisma/
│   └── schema.prisma           # Core PM Decision models
├── apps/
│   └── mcp-server/             # Open-source MCP tools
└── mcp-tools/
    └── decision/

luh-tech/Ectropy-Business (Private)
├── .roadmap/                    # Business roadmap
│   ├── roadmap-business.json   # Pricing, tiers, enterprise
│   └── extensions.json         # Business feature extensions
├── apps/
│   └── assistant-service/      # SEPPA proprietary code
│   └── phone-agent/            # Twilio integration
└── business-tools/
    └── slide-generator/        # Investor/customer decks
```

### 4.3 Files to Mirror Before Split

The following files MUST be present in luhtech/Ectropy `.roadmap/` before the split:

| File/Directory                  | Status      | Action Required                        |
| ------------------------------- | ----------- | -------------------------------------- |
| `roadmap.json`                  | ✅ Current  | Verify Contract-to-Ops features listed |
| `architecture.json`             | ✅ Current  | Verify new service ports               |
| `infrastructure-catalog.json`   | ✅ Current  | Verify new services                    |
| `features/decision-lifecycle/`  | ✅ Complete | No action                              |
| `features/contract-onboarding/` | ✅ Complete | No action                              |
| `features/ipd-governance/`      | ✅ Complete | No action                              |
| `features/closeout/`            | ✅ Complete | No action                              |
| `features/commissioning/`       | ✅ NEW      | Verify committed                       |
| `features/punch-list/`          | ✅ NEW      | Verify committed                       |
| `features/warranty-operations/` | ✅ NEW      | Verify committed                       |
| `schemas/contract/`             | ✅ Complete | Verify committed                       |
| `schemas/ipd/`                  | ✅ Complete | Verify committed                       |
| `schemas/closeout/`             | ✅ Complete | Verify committed                       |
| `schemas/commissioning/`        | ✅ Complete | Verify committed                       |
| `schemas/warranty/`             | ✅ Complete | Verify committed                       |

### 4.4 Synchronization Workflow

```bash
# Step 1: Commit all Contract-to-Operations work
cd C:\Users\luhte\Source\Repos\luhtech\Ectropy
git add .roadmap/features/
git add .roadmap/schemas/
git commit -m "feat(roadmap): Complete Contract-to-Operations feature documentation

Phase 3-4 complete:
- 4 new feature directories with FEATURE.json + interfaces.json
- 13 new MCP tools specified
- 15 V3-compliant schemas
- Full REST API and webhook specifications

Total MCP tools now specified: 39 (17 implemented, 22 planned)

Ref: CONTRACT_TO_OPERATIONS_COMPLETION_REPORT.md"

# Step 2: Push to feature branch
git push origin feature/contract-to-operations

# Step 3: Create PR for review
gh pr create --title "Contract-to-Operations Feature Documentation" \
  --body "Completes Phases 3-4 of Contract-to-Operations roadmap"

# Step 4: After merge, sync to Ectropy-Business
cd C:\Users\luhte\Source\Repos\luh-tech\Ectropy-Business
git fetch upstream
git merge upstream/main

# Step 5: Verify .roadmap mirror
diff -r .roadmap ../luhtech/Ectropy/.roadmap
```

### 4.5 Dashboard/Slide Generation Requirements

For the business-tools slide and dashboard generators to work correctly:

1. **roadmap.json must contain:**
   - All 6 Contract-to-Operations features in `features` array
   - Milestone dates matching FEATURE.json files
   - Quarterly deliverables aligned with releases

2. **Feature directories must contain:**
   - `FEATURE.json` with milestones, dependencies, graphMetadata
   - `interfaces.json` with mcpTools, restApi, webhooks

3. **Schema files must follow V3 pattern:**
   - `$schema`, `$id` (URN), `schemaVersion: "3.0.0"`
   - `graphMetadata` with `inEdges`/`outEdges`
   - `meta` block with `sourceOfTruth`

---

## Part 5: Recommended Action Plan

### Immediate (This Session)

1. ✅ Complete feature documentation (DONE)
2. ⬜ Commit all changes to feature branch
3. ⬜ Verify JSON syntax validation passes
4. ⬜ Create PR for review

### Short-Term (Next Week)

1. Merge Contract-to-Operations PR
2. Sync .roadmap to luh-tech/Ectropy-Business
3. Run slide-generator to verify data availability
4. Run dashboard-generator for Notion sync

### Medium-Term (Q1 2026)

1. Implement Prisma models for Contract domain
2. Implement first 3 Contract MCP tools
3. Deploy to Canadian pilot environment
4. Begin IPD governance tool implementation

### Long-Term (Q2-Q4 2026)

1. Complete all 22 MCP tools
2. Begin Phase 1 graph migration (dual-write)
3. Launch v1.3.0 with Contract/IPD features
4. Evaluate graph migration Phase 2

---

```bash

cd "C:\Users\luhte\Source\Repos\luhtech\Ectropy"

# Stage new files
git add .roadmap/features/closeout/interfaces.json
git add .roadmap/features/commissioning/
git add .roadmap/features/punch-list/
git add .roadmap/features/warranty-operations/
git add .roadmap/features/CONTRACT_TO_OPERATIONS_COMPLETION_REPORT.md

# Commit with detailed message
git commit -m "feat(roadmap): Complete Contract-to-Operations Phases 3-4

NEW FEATURE DOCUMENTATION:
- closeout/interfaces.json (3 MCP tools)
- commissioning/ (FEATURE.json + interfaces.json, 3 tools)
- punch-list/ (FEATURE.json + interfaces.json, 4 tools)
- warranty-operations/ (FEATURE.json + interfaces.json, 3 tools)

TOTAL MCP TOOLS SPECIFIED: 39
- 17 implemented (Decision Lifecycle M2)
- 22 specified (Contract-to-Operations)

All files follow V3 enterprise patterns:
- URN identifiers
- GraphMetadata blocks
- Schema version 3.0.0
- Complete REST API + webhook specs

Prepares repository for Jan 17 split to:
- ectropy-ai/ectropy (public)
- luh-tech/Ectropy-Business (private)

Ref: CONTRACT_TO_OPERATIONS_COMPLETION_REPORT.md"

# Push to feature branch
git push origin HEAD
```

sections.ectropy_strategic_technical_analysis_pri:
**Document Version:** 1.0.0  
**Date:** January 16, 2026  
**Author:** Enterprise Architecture Session  
**Status:** Strategic Planning Document

---
sections.executive_summary:
This document analyzes the next phases of Ectropy development across four critical dimensions:

1. **Prisma Model Extensions** - Adding Contract-to-Operations models to existing M3 schema
2. **Graph Database Migration** - Value proposition and lift assessment for PostgreSQL → Graph transition
3. **MCP Tool Implementation** - Current state and roadmap for 39 total tools
4. **Repository Synchronization** - Preparing luhtech/Ectropy for the January 17 split

---
sections.1_1_current_state_m3_complete_12_models:
The existing `prisma/schema.prisma` contains 12 production-ready models from the Decision Lifecycle milestone:

| Model                     | Purpose                       | URN Pattern                                        | Status    |
| ------------------------- | ----------------------------- | -------------------------------------------------- | --------- |
| `AuthorityLevel`          | 7-tier cascade definition     | `urn:luhtech:ectropy:authority-level:pm-level-{N}` | ✅ Active |
| `Participant`             | Project stakeholder           | `urn:luhtech:{project}:participant:{id}`           | ✅ Active |
| `Voxel`                   | 3D spatial decision container | `urn:luhtech:{project}:voxel:{id}`                 | ✅ Active |
| `PMDecision`              | Construction decision         | `urn:luhtech:{project}:pm-decision:{id}`           | ✅ Active |
| `VoxelDecisionAttachment` | Decision-to-voxel link        | N/A (join table)                                   | ✅ Active |
| `ToleranceOverride`       | Pre-approved variance         | `urn:luhtech:{project}:tolerance:{id}`             | ✅ Active |
| `PreApproval`             | Standing approval scope       | N/A (embedded)                                     | ✅ Active |
| `VoxelAlert`              | Spatial alert                 | N/A (embedded)                                     | ✅ Active |
| `Acknowledgment`          | Worker acknowledgment         | N/A (join table)                                   | ✅ Active |
| `Consequence`             | Decision outcome tracking     | `urn:luhtech:{project}:consequence:{id}`           | ✅ Active |
| `ScheduleProposal`        | Look-ahead modification       | `urn:luhtech:{project}:schedule-proposal:{id}`     | ✅ Active |
| `Inspection`              | Field inspection record       | `urn:luhtech:{project}:inspection:{id}`            | ✅ Active |
sections.1_2_required_new_models_contract_to_oper: Based on the completed schema documentation, **15 additional Prisma models** are required:
sections.ipd_governance_domain_3_models:
```prisma
model VotingSession {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  urn               String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  project_id        String   @map("project_id") @db.Uuid
  voting_body       VotingBody @map("voting_body") // PMT or PET
  topic             String   @db.Text
  motion_text       String   @map("motion_text") @db.Text
  rule_type         VotingRule @map("rule_type") // UNANIMOUS, SUPERMAJORITY, MAJORITY
  status            VotingStatus @default(OPEN)
  votes             Json     @db.JsonB // Array of vote objects
  deadline          DateTime @db.Timestamptz(6)
  // Relations
  project           Project  @relation(fields: [project_id], references: [id])
}

model TargetCost {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  urn               String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  project_id        String   @map("project_id") @db.Uuid
  version           Int      @default(1)
  status            TargetCostStatus @default(PROPOSED)
  base_amount       Decimal  @map("base_amount") @db.Decimal(15,2)
  contingency_amount Decimal @map("contingency_amount") @db.Decimal(15,2)
  total_target_cost Decimal  @map("total_target_cost") @db.Decimal(15,2)
  adjustments       Json?    @db.JsonB
  // Relations
  project           Project  @relation(fields: [project_id], references: [id])
}

model SavingsDistribution {
  id                String   @id @default(uuid()) @db.Uuid
  urn               String   @unique @db.VarChar(200)
  closeout_id       String   @map("closeout_id") @db.Uuid
  distribution_type DistributionType @map("distribution_type") // SAVINGS or OVERRUN
  total_amount      Decimal  @map("total_amount") @db.Decimal(15,2)
  distributions     Json     @db.JsonB // Array of party distributions
  status            DistributionStatus @default(PENDING_APPROVAL)
  // Relations
  closeout          Closeout @relation(fields: [closeout_id], references: [id])
}
```

model Closeout {

model PunchItem {

  assignee_urn      String?  @map("assignee_urn") @db.VarChar(200)

}

}

| Task                             | Hours        | Complexity |
| -------------------------------- | ------------ | ---------- |
| Define enums (15 new)            | 4            | Low        |
| Create 15 models                 | 16           | Medium     |
| Add relations to existing models | 8            | Medium     |
| Generate migrations              | 4            | Low        |
| Write seed data scripts          | 12           | Medium     |

| Integration testing              | 16           | Medium     |
| **Total**                        | **68 hours** |            |

sections.2_1_current_state_json_first_with_graph_:
The V3 architecture uses **PostgreSQL with JSONB graph_metadata columns**:

```json
{
  "$id": "urn:luhtech:project-alpha:pm-decision:DEC-2026-0001",
  "graphMetadata": {
    "inEdges": [
      "urn:luhtech:project-alpha:voxel:VOX-L2-MECH-047",
      "urn:luhtech:project-alpha:participant:john-doe-pm"
    ],
    "outEdges": ["urn:luhtech:project-alpha:consequence:CONSQ-2026-0001"]
  }
}
```

**Advantages:**

- Single database to manage
- Familiar SQL queries for most operations
- Prisma ORM fully supported
- Graph metadata preserved for future migration

**Limitations:**

- Graph traversal requires application-level code
- No native Cypher/Gremlin query support
- Complex joins for deep relationship queries
- Performance degrades with >10,000 edges per query
sections.option_a_neo4j_recommended:
- **Query Language:** Cypher (intuitive, pattern-matching)
- **Best For:** Complex relationship queries, path analysis
- **APOC Library:** 300+ procedures for advanced graph operations
- **Cost:** Enterprise license required for clustering
sections.option_b_dgraph:
- **Query Language:** GraphQL-native
- **Best For:** High-volume writes, horizontal scaling
- **Advantage:** No separate license cost (Apache 2.0)
- **Limitation:** Smaller ecosystem than Neo4j
sections.2_3_value_proposition_of_graph_migration:
| Use Case                               | PostgreSQL        | Graph DB             | Improvement        |
| -------------------------------------- | ----------------- | -------------------- | ------------------ |
| "Find root cause of consequence X"     | 5-7 JOINs, ~200ms | Single Cypher, ~20ms | **10x faster**     |
| "Show all decisions affecting Level 2" | Complex subquery  | Pattern match        | **Simpler code**   |
| "Traverse 6 levels of escalation"      | Recursive CTE     | `MATCH path=...`     | **Native support** |
| "Find patterns across 100 projects"    | Impractical       | Graph analytics      | **New capability** |
| "Real-time decision impact preview"    | Not feasible      | Graph projection     | **New capability** |
sections.phase_1_dual_write_architecture_low_risk:
- Keep PostgreSQL as primary
- Write graph_metadata to Neo4j in parallel
- No production dependency on graph DB
- **Effort:** 40 hours
sections.phase_2_graph_first_queries_medium_risk:
- Route relationship queries to Neo4j
- Keep CRUD operations in PostgreSQL
- Fallback to PostgreSQL if graph unavailable
- **Effort:** 80 hours
sections.phase_3_full_migration_high_value_higher:
- Move decision graph entirely to Neo4j
- PostgreSQL for user/project CRUD only
- Requires significant testing
- **Effort:** 160 hours
sections.2_5_recommendation:
**Start Phase 1 in Q3 2026 after Canadian pilot launch.**

The current PostgreSQL + JSONB architecture is sufficient for:

- Pilot scale (single project, <10,000 decisions)
- Demo scenarios
- MVP launch

Graph migration becomes critical when:

- Multi-project portfolio queries required
- Pattern recognition across projects
- Real-time decision impact analysis

---

sections.4_5_dashboard_slide_generation_requireme:
For the business-tools slide and dashboard generators to work correctly:

1. **roadmap.json must contain:**
   - All 6 Contract-to-Operations features in `features` array
   - Milestone dates matching FEATURE.json files
   - Quarterly deliverables aligned with releases

2. **Feature directories must contain:**
   - `FEATURE.json` with milestones, dependencies, graphMetadata
   - `interfaces.json` with mcpTools, restApi, webhooks

3. **Schema files must follow V3 pattern:**
   - `$schema`, `$id` (URN), `schemaVersion: "3.0.0"`
   - `graphMetadata` with `inEdges`/`outEdges`
   - `meta` block with `sourceOfTruth`

---
